Bus Timings

15 RTA Bus Timings - Al Ghubaiba Bus Station to Al Khail Gate

August 8, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

This route not only offers a reliable means of transportation across Dubai but also provides an affordable and convenient way to explore the city. With its strategic schedule and numerous stops, the 15 bus route ensures accessibility to key areas and amenities, making it a popular choice for many travelers.

Operational Details

The 15 bus runs daily, starting its service at 5:20 AM from Al Ghubaiba Bus Station and operating until around 10:30 PM. This comprehensive schedule caters to a variety of travel needs, whether you’re commuting to work or exploring the city.

From Ghubaiba Bus Station From Al Khail Gate
05:20 05:40
05:45 06:00
06:00 06:30
06:20 06:45
06:40 07:05
07:05 07:25
07:28 07:45
07:48 08:10
08:08 08:35
08:28 08:58
08:50 09:20
09:15 09:40
09:35 10:00
10:00 10:20
10:20 10:40

11:15 11:30

12:50 12:50
13:20 13:20
13:50 13:55

14:40 14:55

15:40 15:35

16:20 16:20
16:40 16:38

22:05 22:09
22:30  

Bus 15 Timetable

For the latest bus timings, passengers are encouraged to visit the official RTA website or check the 15 RTA Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: The fare for the 15 bus is AED 3 within one zone when using a Silver or Personal Nol card. Payments are made through Dubai’s cashless Nol card system, which can be easily recharged at various locations throughout the city, ensuring a smooth travel experience without cash.

Route Overview

The 15 bus route begins at Al Ghubaiba Bus Station and travels through several key stops, providing access to important commercial, residential, and community areas. Notable stops along the route include: 1.

  1. Sharaf DG Metro Station An important transfer hub for passengers using the metro, allowing seamless access to different areas of Dubai.

  2. Al Quoz Bus Station Located in the commercial district, this stop serves local businesses and provides connections to essential services.

  3. Raffa A neighborhood stop that connects residents to nearby amenities and services.

  4. Rolla A key stop that facilitates access to various local services and nearby areas.

  5. Standard Chartered Bank A convenient stop for banking services and financial transactions.

  6. Sheikh Rashid Road Intersection A crucial junction that connects different routes for efficient travel.

  7. Hudheiba, Turnoff A local stop providing access to surrounding residential areas.

  8. Hana Center A commercial hub that offers shopping and dining options for passengers.

  9. Satwa, Masjid A community-focused stop near the local mosque, serving both residents and visitors.

  10. Satwa, Clinic Close to healthcare facilities, this stop is essential for those needing medical services.

  11. Bada A stop that provides access to local businesses and residential areas.

  12. Satwa Square A central point for community activities and local shops.

  13. Khadri Masjid A stop near the mosque, catering to worshippers and community members.

  14. Bilal Bin Ribah School Serving students and families in the area, providing access to educational facilities.

  15. Satwa Road A main thoroughfare connecting various neighborhoods and services.

  16. Rehabilitation Center A stop that provides access to health and rehabilitation services for the community.

  17. Emirates Bank Conveniently located for banking and financial needs.

  18. Police Training School A stop serving those associated with the training institution and surrounding areas.

  19. Jumeira, Post Office An important stop for postal services in the Jumeira area.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

21.

  1. Box Park 2 Another section of the popular shopping and dining destination, enhancing local culture.

  2. Hadiqa Street A local stop that connects residents to nearby amenities.

  3. Honda, Training Center A stop serving those attending training programs at the center.

  4. Al Quoz Bus Station External This external station connects passengers to other transit options and local services.

  5. Queen Palace Factory A stop catering to those working in the nearby industrial area.

  6. Galadari Printing & Publishing A convenient stop for employees and visitors to this publishing house.

  7. Khaleej Times Serving employees and visitors to the prominent media organization.

  8. Latifa Bin Hamdan Street A key thoroughfare connecting various routes for efficient travel.

  9. Al Khail Gate Entrance The gateway to a developing area with affordable housing options.

  10. Al Quoz, Al Khail Gate, 1 A local stop in a developing residential area, offering access to essential services.

  11. Al Quoz, Al Khail Gate, 2 Another stop in the same area, providing convenient access for residents.

Accessibility Features

The 15 bus service is designed with inclusivity in mind. The fleet includes low-floor buses to facilitate easy boarding, designated seating for passengers with disabilities, and audio-visual aids to assist those with hearing or vision impairments. These features ensure that the 15 bus route accommodates all passengers, providing a comfortable travel experience.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

At Al Ghubaiba Bus Station, passengers can easily transfer to various metro lines and other bus routes, enhancing their travel options across the city. Similarly, Al Khail Gate provides access to local services and amenities, making onward journeys more convenient.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

1.

2.

  1. Jumeira Beach A popular spot for relaxation and water activities, easily accessible via additional transport options.

Journey Experience

A traveler recently took a long journey on Bus Route 15 from Al Ghubaiba Bus Station to Al Khail Gate, enjoying a captivating ride through Dubai’s vibrant streets. Departing at 5:20 AM, the bus passed iconic landmarks like the Burj Khalifa and Dubai Mall, along with the artsy Al Quoz district, known for its galleries. Notable stops included Sharaf DG Metro Station for easy connections and Satwa, Masjid, where local life thrives amid diverse eateries.

As the bus approached Al Khail Gate, the landscape turned suburban, highlighting the area’s affordable housing and new shopping centers. Overall, Route 15 provided a comfortable and enriching perspective on Dubai’s urban landscape, making it a great choice for travelers.

Tips and Travel Advice

To ensure a smooth journey on the 15 bus, travelers are advised to:

  • Plan ahead by checking the bus schedule, particularly during peak hours.

  • Load their Nol card sufficiently before boarding to avoid any delays.
  • Utilize the RTA app for real-time updates and live bus timings for added convenience.

Bus 15, an Urban Bus of RTA Dubai, exemplifies the city’s commitment to efficient public transportation. With a comprehensive schedule, strategic stops, and accessibility features, this route caters to both daily commuters and tourists. Whether you’re heading to work or exploring Dubai’s attractions, the 15 bus offers a reliable and comfortable travel option. For the latest updates and information, passengers are encouraged to visit the RTA website or use the RTA app. Check out the full RTA Dubai bus route for more options!

Official UAE Sources

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 8, 2025.
